fees.description: A 3% service fee applied to your total ticket and seat cost to cover booking platform operations and customer support.
A flat $3.00 convenience fee charged per booking for using our online payment processing system.
A 2% fuel surcharge to offset fluctuating airline fuel costs, applied to the subtotal.
An 8% sales tax applied to the total booking amount as required by applicable tax regulations.
